codeReview.summary: The resolver change correctly adds a trait namespace, registers declared traits during global collection, rejects undefined trait names in `impl Trait for Type`, and rejects undefined bound traits on generic parameters across the resolver entry points exercised by the feature. Added positive and negative resolver tests match VAL-SEM-016 and VAL-SEM-017, and diagnostics include the missing trait name.

summary: Reviewed commit d5969ef and the worker transcript/handoff for phase-4-fix-trait-name-resolution-gaps. The implementation appears complete for VAL-SEM-016 and VAL-SEM-017, with no blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
